title: Test onCreate method
test_steps: ["Launch the application", "Verify that the activity is created without errors"]
expected_result: ["The onCreate method should initialize the components and set up the listeners"]

title: Test setSpan method
test_steps: ["Launch the application", "Verify that the clickable span is set on the registration link"]
expected_result: ["The setSpan method should correctly apply the clickable span to the registration link"]

title: Test onClick method - Navigate to RegistrationActivity
test_steps: ["Click on the 'Registrati' part of the registration link", "Verify that the RegistrationActivity is started"]
expected_result: ["The onClick method should start the RegistrationActivity"]

title: Test loginUser method - Empty Email
test_steps: ["Enter an empty email and a valid password", "Click on the login button", "Verify that an error message is displayed for the email field"]
expected_result: ["The loginUser method should display an error message for the email field if it is empty"]

title: Test loginUser method - Empty Password
test_steps: ["Enter a valid email and an empty password", "Click on the login button", "Verify that an error message is displayed for the password field"]
expected_result: ["The loginUser method should display an error message for the password field if it is empty"]

title: Test loginUser method - Invalid Credentials
test_steps: ["Enter invalid email and password", "Click on the login button", "Verify that an error message is displayed indicating invalid credentials"]
expected_result: ["The loginUser method should display an error message indicating invalid credentials"]

title: Test loginUser method - Successful Login
test_steps: ["Enter valid email and password", "Click on the login button", "Verify that a success message is displayed and the MainActivity is started"]
expected_result: ["The loginUser method should display a success message and start the MainActivity upon successful login"]
